equipmentMods.trinket: Rain of Flames: Fire an two additional meteors.

equipmentMods.belt: Chain Lightning: Chain lightning will link three additional times.

equipmentMods.trinket: Lightning Totems: Totems will now summon two additional Lightning bolts.

equipmentMods.belt: Carnage of Fire: Now spawns on enemies. When the fire hits the ground, spawn a flaming spike that gains a 85% damage bonus.
equipmentMods.goblet: Spark: When Sparks collide, they have a 33% chance to spawn a plasma sphere that deals 100% damage . After 2 seconds it explodes for 200% damage. Plasma sphere may consume sparks to gain +50% damage bonus.

equipmentMods.relic: While moving, your character generates Veil stacks, up to 50. Gain 0.5% Damage Reduction per stack but getting hit will drop all stacks
equipmentMods.trinket: Spark: Each spark propagates four additional times.

equipmentMods.trinket: Arcane Apocalypse: Arcane Apocalypse gains a 50% chance to explode a second time, and a 25% to explode a third time.
